song_name: Hozier - Too Sweet - Gnarls Barkley - Crazy
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
My First Mashup! (The Oh-ohs At The End Are To The Tune Of Too Sweet’s Chorus.)

[Intro]

[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
It can't be said I'm an early bird[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F[/ch]
It's ten o'clock before I say a word[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]E7[/ch]
Baby, I can never tell  How do you sleep so well?[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
You keep telling me to live right[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
To go to bed before the daylight[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]F[/ch]
But then you wake up for the sunrise[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]G[/ch]
You know you don't gotta pretend[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E7[/ch]
Baby, now and then[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't you just wanna wake up / Dark as a lake[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Smelling like a bonfire / Lost in a haze?[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
If you're drunk on life, babe / I think it's great[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]E7[/ch]
But while in this world, I think I’ll take[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
… my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E7[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
I take my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]E7[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Does that make me crazy?[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Does that make me crazy??[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Does that make me crazy???[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Esus4[/ch]     [ch]E7[/ch]
Possibly.[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                               [ch]C[/ch]
And I hope that you are having the time of your life[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
But think twice, that's my only advice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                                                  [ch]C[/ch]
Come on now who do you, who do you, who do you, who do you think you are,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Ha ha ha bless your soul[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
You really think you're in control[/tab]

[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Well, I think you're crazy![/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
I think you're crazy![/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]
I think you're crazy,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]     [ch]E7[/ch]
Just like me.[/tab]

[Verse 3]

[tab]N.C.                       [ch]Am[/ch]
You know you're bright as the morning / As soft as the rain[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Pretty as a vine / As sweet as a grape[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
If you can sit in a barrel / Maybe I'll wait[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]
Until that day I'd rather take[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
…my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Maybe I'm crazy[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Maybe you're crazy[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Maybe we're crazy[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Esus4[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Just like me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh Oh-oh / Oh-oh-oh-oh Oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh Oh-oh / Oh-oh-oh-oh Oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E7[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
I take my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Maybe I’m crazy, but[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]
           …Probablyyyyyyyyyyyyyy…[/tab]
[ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]E7[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
